name: Ultimate Fire Formation - Sinto
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>辰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>斗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card is activated, while you control a "Fire Fist" monster and a "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only activate 1 "Ultimate Fire Formation - Sinto" per turn.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card is activated, while you control a "Fire Fist" monster and a "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only activate 1 "Ultimate Fire Formation - Sinto" per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
